title: Fix Orbit Dock interaction: swipe-only active state, tap-to-open, side-icon rotation-first behavior

requirements.text: In the OrbitDock component (frontend/src/components/OrbitDock.tsx), remove any logic that automatically opens/activates a function when a swipe gesture lands an item in the center position. Swiping must only update the visual active state (the centered item) without triggering navigation or opening any view.

quotes: Όταν ο χρήστης κάνει swipe στο dock και μία λειτουργία μετακινείται στο κέντρο: Να ΜΗΝ ανοίγει αυτόματα η λειτουργία. Το swipe να αλλάζει μόνο την ενεργή (active) κατάσταση οπτικά.

acceptanceCriteria: Swiping the dock left or right moves items along the arc and updates which item is visually active (centered).
After a swipe completes, no view, dialog, or panel opens automatically.
The existing infinite circular swipe, scale hierarchy, opacity hierarchy, and orbital animation remain unchanged.

requirements.text: In OrbitDock, implement open-on-tap logic: a function (Upload, Folders, Mission) opens only when (a) its icon is already in the center/active position AND (b) the user taps that centered icon. A tap on the centered icon must fire the appropriate navigation/open callback.

quotes: Η λειτουργία να ανοίγει μόνο όταν: Το εικονίδιο βρίσκεται στο κέντρο (active state) ΚΑΙ Ο χρήστης κάνει tap επάνω στο κεντρικό εικονίδιο.

acceptanceCriteria: Tapping the centered (active) icon opens the corresponding function (Upload, Folders, or Mission).
All existing open/navigation callbacks for each function continue to work correctly once triggered by this tap.
No other interaction (swipe, tap on side icon) opens a function.

requirements.text: In OrbitDock, implement rotation-first behavior for side (inactive) icon taps: when the user taps an icon that is NOT currently centered, the dock smoothly rotates to bring that icon to the center (active state), but does NOT open the function. A second tap on the now-centered icon is required to open it.

quotes: Αν ο χρήστης κάνει tap σε πλαϊνό (inactive) εικονίδιο: Να εκτελείται πρώτα ομαλή περιστροφή ώστε να έρθει στο κέντρο. Να ΜΗΝ ανοίγει ακόμη η λειτουργία. Να απαιτείται δεύτερο tap για να ανοίξει.

acceptanceCriteria: Tapping a side icon triggers a smooth rotation animation that brings it to the center position.
After the rotation, only the visual active state changes — the function does not open.
A subsequent tap on the now-centered icon opens the function.
The rotation animation reuses the existing orbital/smooth-rotation mechanism without introducing new animation systems.

requirements.text: Add subtle tap visual and haptic feedback to all OrbitDock icon interactions: on every tap (whether on the centered icon or a side icon), the tapped icon scales down to 0.95 for 100–120ms before returning to its normal scale. Additionally, trigger a light haptic vibration (using navigator.vibrate([10]) or equivalent) if the browser/device supports it.

quotes: Πρόσθεσε διακριτικό visual feedback στο tap: Scale 0.95 για 100–120ms. Ελαφρύ haptic feedback (αν υποστηρίζεται).

acceptanceCriteria: Every tap on any dock icon (center or side) produces a brief scale-down to 0.95 lasting 100–120ms, then returns to the normal scale.
On devices/browsers that support navigator.vibrate, a short light vibration (≤15ms) fires on each tap.
On devices that do not support haptics, the tap interaction proceeds silently without errors.
The scale feedback does not conflict with the existing scale/opacity hierarchy applied by the carousel positioning.

constraints: Do not change any backend logic, data models, or API calls.
Do not modify any other component, hook, page, or utility outside of OrbitDock.tsx and its direct tap/swipe interaction logic.
Preserve the existing infinite circular swipe behavior.
Preserve the existing scale and opacity hierarchy for dock items.
Do not alter any open/navigation callbacks consumed by HomePage.tsx — only change when they are invoked.
Do not edit any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design, colors, or layout of the Orbit Dock.
Adding new dock items or changing the Upload/Folders/Mission functions.
Modifying any full-screen views (FoldersFullScreenView, MissionsFullScreenView, FileUploadSection).
Changing authentication, file management, or any other app logic.
Altering the useCircularCarousel hook internals beyond what is needed to decouple swipe from open.
